# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

.build_template:
  stage: build
  tags:
    - shared
  script:
    - !reference [.build_script_content]
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/"
      - "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/dist/"
      - "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/target/"
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: always

include:
  - local: '.gitlab-ci-build.yml' # This file is expected to define `build_script_content`

stages:
  - build

# Example usage in .gitlab-ci-build.yml:
#
# .build_script_content: &build_script_content
#   - echo "Running custom build for this project..."
#   - if [ -f "./gradlew" ]; then ./gradlew build; fi
#   - if [ -f "package.json" ]; then npm install && npm run build; fi
#   - if [ -f "Makefile" ]; then make all; fi
#   - # Add more custom build logic as needed
#
# build_job:
#   extends: .build_template
